facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this one. AROMA Cafe Bistro Bar Phu Quoc sits inside Happy Bear Hostel on 179 30/4 Street, and most visitors never even slow down. 4.9 stars across 468 reviews. That number doesn't lie. Order something, find a seat, and you'll understand why regulars keep it quiet. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 468 people rated this cafe 4.9 stars and almost nobody outside the hostel crowd knows it exists. AROMA Cafe Bistro Bar inside Happy Bear Hostel. Go find it on 30/4 Street.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about AROMA Cafe Bistro Bar. 4.9 stars. 468 reviews. Inside Happy Bear Hostel on 30/4 Street. Tag your travel buddy.
